name: hypertaks
description: Hypertaks Founder Operating System with secure founder continuity, evidence-backed memory, Graphify routing, and cross-agent handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Founder OS with verified continuity and execution.
interface.longDescription: Turns your agent into the Hypertaks Founder: a contract-bound operating protocol that preserves founder decisions, routes retrieval and Graphify by need, reuses approved Obsidian-compatible memory, and verifies completion evidence.
defaultPrompt: Hypertaks, verify this project and connect my main brain.
Hypertaks, resume the current project and prove what remains unfinished.
